title: BFA Fashion Design Senior Show
description: Celebrate the graduating Fashion Design Class of 2026—a cohort of nine emerging designers. The evening opens with a gallery-style presentation, where a single look from each designer previews their collection. Guests can view the work up close before the program transitions outdoors, culminating in a runway show in the courtyard garden—where each designer presents five original looks, offering a full expression of their vision, craft, and approach to contemporary fashion.

gallery.alt: Four student artists pose together in front of their large-scale white exhibition display in a gallery space.
A large crowd of visitors gathers outside a contemporary building with distinctive wooden architectural framework and white flowers in the landscaping.
A performer wearing a bright yellow jacket and pink wings stands on a paved outdoor plaza surrounded by spectators and tall wooden pillars with colorful artwork.
A bright gallery space with industrial ceilings displays multiple large-scale installations including colorful panels and a dark sculptural structure with mixed media elements.
A student sits on a wooden bench in a minimalist studio space with green plants, shelving with decorative objects, and mood boards pinned to the wall behind him.
